global.description: The ad features a clean design with a focus on security and simplicity.
global.main_message: Promoting a secure and straightforward financial service.

elements.label: Abstract shapes background
elements.description: A soft green background featuring overlapping geometric shapes, including circles and rectangles.

elements.label: ClearLedger logo
elements.description: A simple, modern logo with the text 'ClearLedger' displayed prominently at the top.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small circular badge labeled 'UGC' positioned at the top left corner.

elements.label: Secure & simple headline
elements.description: A bold, white headline reading 'Secure & simple' with a smaller text below it stating 'No hidden fees'.

elements.label: Get offer button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom center with the text 'Get offer' in a clear, inviting font.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, minimalist with soft colors, ClearLedger logo, secure and simple headline
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the headline in the center, with a social proof badge in the top left and a CTA button at the bottom.
